homepage.heroSubline: Protecting your property with durable, expertly installed fences. Serving Nashville and surrounding areas with pride and precision.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Driven by Quality
aboutText: The Fence Man started with a simple goal: to provide Nashville homeowners and businesses with superior fencing solutions built to last. Founded by a Tennessee native with a passion for craftsmanship, we understand the unique challenges our local climate presents – from the humid summers to the occasional ice storms.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our team is committed to using only the highest quality materials and proven installation techniques. We take pride in our work, ensuring every fence we build is strong, secure, and aesthetically pleasing.

We're more than just a fencing company; we're part of the Nashville community. We believe in giving back, supporting local charities, and building lasting relationships with our clients. When you choose The Fence Man, you're choosing a neighbor who cares.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our experienced team ensures precise installation, built to withstand Nashville's weather.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We use durable, weather-resistant materials for long-lasting performance and beauty.

valueProps.description: We create fences tailored to your property's unique needs and aesthetic preferences.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Nashville's specific fencing challenges and building codes.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote for your fencing project. Call now!

services.name: Wood Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences expertly installed for privacy and beauty.
services.description:
We specialize in crafting and installing wood fences that enhance the beauty and security of your property. From traditional picket fences to privacy fences, we offer a wide range of wood options to suit your style and budget. We understand Nashville's unique climate and use pressure-treated lumber to ensure longevity and resistance to rot, insects, and the elements. Our experienced team handles every aspect of the installation process, from precise measurements and post setting to meticulous finishing touches. We take pride in creating wood fences that not only look great but also stand the test of time, adding value and curb appeal to your home.

Whether you're looking to define your property line, create a safe space for children and pets, or simply add a touch of rustic charm, a wood fence from The Fence Man is an excellent choice. We offer a variety of styles, including shadowbox, board-on-board, and split-rail, and can customize your fence with decorative posts, caps, and other accents. We also handle all necessary permits and inspections, ensuring a hassle-free experience for our clients.

We source our wood from local suppliers, supporting our community and ensuring the highest quality materials. Our commitment to craftsmanship and customer satisfaction is unmatched. Let us help you design and install the perfect wood fence for your Nashville property.
process: Step 1: Consultation & Design – Discuss your needs and choose the perfect style and materials.
Step 2: Site Preparation – We'll prepare the ground and mark fence lines accurately.
Step 3: Post Installation – Setting posts securely is crucial for a long-lasting fence.
Step 4: Fence Construction – Careful assembly and finishing touches for a beautiful result.

faq.question: How long will a wood fence last in Nashville's climate?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance and pressure-treated lumber, a wood fence can last 15-20 years, even with Nashville's humidity and occasional storms.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a fence in Nashville?
faq.answer: Yes, most fence installations require a permit in Nashville. We handle the permit process for you, ensuring compliance with all local regulations.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fences in Nashville?
faq.answer: Pressure-treated pine is a popular and cost-effective choice for fences in Nashville. It's resistant to rot, insects, and the elements.

services.name: Chain Link Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and affordable chain link fences for security and containment.
services.description:
For reliable security and containment, a chain link fence is a practical and cost-effective solution. The Fence Man provides professional chain link fence installation services for residential, commercial, and industrial properties in Nashville and the surrounding areas. We use high-quality galvanized steel to ensure maximum durability and resistance to rust and corrosion. Our experienced installers ensure proper tension and alignment for a secure and long-lasting fence.

Chain link fences are ideal for a variety of applications, including securing yards, protecting commercial properties, and enclosing athletic fields. They are also a great option for pet containment, providing a safe and secure space for your furry friends to roam. We offer a range of heights and gauges to meet your specific needs, and can also install gates and access control systems for added security.

In addition to standard galvanized chain link, we also offer vinyl-coated options in a variety of colors to enhance the aesthetic appeal of your fence. Vinyl coating provides added protection against the elements and can blend seamlessly with your landscaping. The Fence Man is committed to providing top-quality chain link fence installation services at competitive prices. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment – We evaluate your property and discuss your specific security needs.
Step 2: Material Selection – Choose the right gauge and height for your chain link fence.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our team ensures proper tension and secure anchoring.
Step 4: Final Inspection – We verify the fence meets our high standards and your satisfaction.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a chain link fence?
faq.answer: The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most chain link fence installations can be completed in 1-2 days.

faq.question: Can I customize my chain link fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of customization options, including vinyl coating, different heights, and gate styles.

faq.question: Do you offer warranties on chain link fences?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer warranties on both materials and workmanship for our chain link fence installations.

services.name: Vinyl Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance vinyl fences for lasting beauty and elegance.
services.description:
Enhance your property with a beautiful and durable vinyl fence from The Fence Man. Vinyl fences offer a low-maintenance alternative to wood, providing lasting beauty and elegance without the need for painting, staining, or sealing. We offer a wide variety of vinyl fence styles, including privacy fences, picket fences, and decorative fences, to complement any home or landscape. Our experienced installers ensure precise and secure installation for a fence that will stand the test of time.

Vinyl fences are resistant to rot, insects, and the elements, making them an ideal choice for Nashville's climate. They are also easy to clean and maintain, simply requiring occasional washing with soap and water. With a wide range of colors and styles to choose from, you can create a custom look that reflects your personal taste and enhances your property's curb appeal.

The Fence Man is committed to providing top-quality vinyl fence installation services at competitive prices. We use only the highest quality vinyl materials and employ proven installation techniques to ensure a long-lasting and beautiful fence. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We help you choose the perfect vinyl fence style and color.
Step 2: Precise Measurements – Accurate measurements ensure a perfect fit for your property.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our team handles every aspect of the installation process with care.
Step 4: Quality Assurance – We inspect the fence to ensure it meets our high standards.

faq.question: How long will a vinyl fence last?
faq.answer: A properly installed vinyl fence can last for 30 years or more with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Is vinyl fencing more expensive than wood fencing?
faq.answer: While the initial cost of vinyl fencing may be higher than wood, the long-term cost is often lower due to reduced maintenance requirements.

faq.question: Can vinyl fences be painted?
faq.answer: While vinyl fences are designed to maintain their color, they can be painted with a paint specifically designed for vinyl.

services.name: Aluminum Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant and rust-proof aluminum fences for security and style.
services.description:
Add a touch of elegance and security to your property with an aluminum fence from The Fence Man. Aluminum fences offer a classic and sophisticated look while providing reliable security and protection. They are also rust-proof and low-maintenance, making them an ideal choice for Nashville's climate. We offer a variety of aluminum fence styles, including ornamental fences, pool fences, and security fences, to meet your specific needs.

Aluminum fences are a great option for homeowners who want a beautiful and durable fence without the hassle of painting or staining. They are also a popular choice for pool enclosures, providing a safe and secure barrier around your swimming pool. Our experienced installers ensure precise and secure installation for a fence that will stand the test of time.

The Fence Man is committed to providing top-quality aluminum fence installation services at competitive prices. We use only the highest quality aluminum materials and employ proven installation techniques to ensure a long-lasting and beautiful fence. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Design and Planning – We'll help you choose the right aluminum fence style.
Step 2: Site Preparation – Ensuring a level and stable base for your fence.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Expert installation for lasting beauty and security.
Step 4: Final Inspection – We make sure everything is perfect before we leave.

faq.question: Are aluminum fences strong enough to keep pets in?
faq.answer: Yes, aluminum fences are strong enough to contain most pets, especially when installed with appropriate height and spacing.

faq.question: Can aluminum fences be used around swimming pools?
faq.answer: Yes, aluminum fences are a popular choice for pool enclosures because they are rust-proof and meet safety requirements.

faq.question: Do aluminum fences require any maintenance?
faq.answer: Aluminum fences require very little maintenance. Occasional washing with soap and water is usually sufficient to keep them looking their best.

services.name: Farm Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and reliable farm fences for livestock containment.
services.description:
Protect your livestock and define your property with a sturdy and reliable farm fence from The Fence Man. We specialize in installing a variety of farm fence styles, including barbed wire fences, woven wire fences, and electric fences, to meet the specific needs of your farm or ranch. Our experienced installers use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a long-lasting and effective fence.

Farm fences are essential for containing livestock, preventing predators from entering your property, and defining property lines. We understand the unique challenges of farm fencing and offer customized solutions to meet your specific needs. Whether you need a fence for cattle, horses, sheep, or other livestock, we can provide a durable and reliable solution.

The Fence Man is committed to providing top-quality farm fence installation services at competitive prices. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven installation techniques to ensure a long-lasting and effective fence. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Site Survey and Planning – Understanding your livestock and property layout.
Step 2: Material Selection – Choosing the right fence type for your animals.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Secure and reliable fence construction.
Step 4: Final Inspection – Ensuring the fence meets your specific needs.

faq.question: What type of fence is best for containing cattle?
faq.answer: Barbed wire fences and woven wire fences are both effective options for containing cattle.

faq.question: How high should a farm fence be?
faq.answer: The height of a farm fence depends on the type of livestock you are containing. A fence for cattle should be at least 48 inches high, while a fence for horses should be at least 54 inches high.

faq.question: Do you offer electric fence installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer electric fence installation for livestock containment and predator control.

services.name: Fence Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable fence repair to restore your fence's integrity.
services.description:
Don't let a damaged fence compromise your property's security and curb appeal. The Fence Man offers prompt and reliable fence repair services to restore your fence's integrity and functionality. Whether your fence has been damaged by weather, age, or accidents, our experienced technicians can quickly assess the damage and provide effective repairs.

We repair all types of fences, including wood fences, chain link fences, vinyl fences, and aluminum fences. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. Our goal is to provide you with a cost-effective solution that restores your fence to its original condition.

From replacing broken posts and panels to repairing gates and latches, we handle all types of fence repairs. We also offer emergency fence repair services for urgent situations. The Fence Man is committed to providing top-quality fence repair services at competitive prices. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment – We thoroughly inspect the fence to identify all issues.
Step 2: Repair Plan – We'll propose a cost-effective repair solution.
Step 3: Efficient Repairs – Our team will complete the repairs quickly and effectively.
Step 4: Quality Check – We ensure the repairs meet our high standards.

faq.question: How much does fence repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of fence repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of fence. We offer free estimates to provide you with an accurate quote.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency fence repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency fence repair services for urgent situations.

faq.question: What types of fences do you repair?
faq.answer: We repair all types of fences, including wood fences, chain link fences, vinyl fences, and aluminum fences.

serviceAreas.content:
The Fence Man is proud to offer our expert fence installation and repair services to the residents of Franklin, Tennessee. Known for its charming historic downtown and beautiful antebellum homes, Franklin requires fences that not only provide security and privacy but also complement the area's unique architectural style. We understand the importance of preserving Franklin's aesthetic appeal while providing durable and long-lasting fencing solutions.

Our team has extensive experience working with a variety of fencing materials suitable for Franklin's hot, humid summers, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and wrought iron. Whether you need a classic picket fence for your historic home, a privacy fence for your backyard, or a decorative fence for your garden, we can help you choose the perfect option to enhance your property and meet your specific needs. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and quality workmanship to ensure your complete satisfaction.
serviceAreas.localContext: Franklin's historic character demands careful consideration when selecting fencing materials and styles, ensuring new installations blend seamlessly with the existing architecture.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: The Fence Man did an amazing job installing our new wood privacy fence. The crew was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic! It really enhances our backyard and gives us the privacy we wanted. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We needed a chain link fence installed around our commercial property for security. The Fence Man provided a quick and affordable solution. The installation was smooth, and the fence is exactly what we needed. Good work!

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: We chose The Fence Man to install a white vinyl picket fence around our front yard. The fence is beautiful and adds so much curb appeal to our home. The installation team was very professional and paid attention to every detail. Very happy with the results!

reviews.name: John S.
reviews.text: After a recent storm, our wood fence was damaged. The Fence Man came out quickly and repaired the fence perfectly. They were able to match the existing wood and the repairs are seamless. Great service!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We had an aluminum fence installed around our pool for safety. The Fence Man did a great job with the installation, the fence looks great and meets all the safety requirements. We highly recommend their services.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: As a local farmer, I needed help putting up a fence for my cattle. The Fence Man came out and installed a high quality fence, and it was installed very quickly! My cows are happy and so am I!
